sectionTitle: My Closest "Family" | 我最親的家「人」

samples.pinyin: wǒ de mǔqīn fēicháng téng'ài wǒ.

samples.vi: Mẹ tôi rất yêu thương tôi.

samples.pinyin: tā hěn ài tā de shuāngqīn.
samples.en: He loves his parents very much.

samples.meaning: next of kin; related by blood; of blood relationship
samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ de qīn diē.

samples.meaning: next of kin; related by blood; of blood relationship
samples.pinyin: tāmen shì qīn gē liǎ.

samples.en: He raised a dog.
samples.vi: Anh ấy nuôi một con chó đực.

samples.meaning: introduces the agent of an action; equivalent to "被"

samples.en: The phone was taken away by him.

samples.meaning: introduces the agent of an action; equivalent to "被"

samples.en: My clothes got soaked by the rain.

samples.pinyin: ng`! jiù zhème bàn ba!

samples.pinyin: wǒ yào qù wǒ nǎinai jiā!

samples.pinyin: Tā yéye qùnián guòshì le.
